title: Indulgent Slovakian Yeast Beets Tagine
description: A dense, rich, and comforting Slovakian dish featuring beets, yeast, and spices, cooked to perfection in a traditional tagine.
instructions: In a small bowl, combine yeast and warm milk, let it sit for 5 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
Add the yeast mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Poke the dough with a fork and let it rise for another 30 minutes.
Bake the bread for 35-40 minutes until golden brown.
While the bread is baking, peel and chop the beets into small pieces.
In a large pan, cook the beets over low heat with butter until tender.
Add the chopped walnuts and raisins to the pan and cook for another 2 minutes.
Slice the bread into thick slices, place them on a serving platter, and serve with the beet mixture.
